events.label: assistant
events.text:
Assessment written to `/app/answer.json`.

Readings: O2 20.9% (normal), LEL 1% (normal), H2S 2 ppm (normal) — but **CO 292 ppm** far exceeds OSHA's PEL (35 ppm TWA / 200 ppm ceiling) and typical meter alarm setpoints. This single out-of-range channel is enough to fail the pre-entry test under 1910.146: entry must not be authorized until the CO source is identified, the space is ventilated, and the atmosphere is re-tested clean.
